Body.Content:
The OneDrive Shared view on iPhone and iPad now features a streamlined two-tab layout. The "With you" tab shows files others have shared with you, while the "By you" tab displays files you've shared. Quickly find shared content with new sorting options and file type filters, plus see recent sharing and editing activity at a glance.

GA date: June CY2026
